global.description: The ad features a light gray background with a prominent logo and promotional text.
global.main_message: Promoting best-selling products at a price of €19.99.

elements.label: light gray background
elements.description: A light gray background fills the top portion of the ad, providing a neutral base.

elements.label: BoltCart logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'BoltCart' in a bold, modern font, positioned prominently at the top.

elements.label: UGC icon

elements.description: A visual representation of products with two rectangular shapes resembling mobile app screenshots.
